bitcoin_merchant_maps_list_your_business: Amabalazwe Abathengisi be-Bitcoin - Bhalisa ibhizinisi lakho mahhala
maps_header: BHALISA KUMABALAZWE ABATHENGISI BE-BITCOIN FUTHI UTHOLE AMAKHASIMENDE AMANINGI
maps_request_details: Faka ulwazi lwebhizinisi lakho ngezansi bese sikufaka kumabalazwe abathengisi be-Bitcoin mahhala. Lokhu kuzovumela ama-Bitcoiner ukuthola ibhizinisi lakho futhi basebenzise i-Bitcoin yabo ebhizinisini lakho!
